PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: added ReadOnlyCommand permission hooks, hardened against shell-expansion false-approves

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-context.summary: shipped the ccx web op family — a fetch/cite/chunk engine with BM25+RRF fusion and local embeddings (v0.7.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: polished the viz web UI — SSE reconnect refetch, a faceted Browse tab, and a duplicate guard on Create (v0.21.1)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pool.summary: built cross-host credential sync end to end (P1–P3) and added account add/relogin via claude auth login

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: reworked the codex lane to run Skill(codex) inline and gave repo-bootstrap end-marker-delimited fragment sync (v0.39.1)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-vigil.summary: shipped CCVigil — a notarized menu-bar app whose oracle ages out stale Claude sessions (v0.1.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/cookiesync.summary: added a requestor command and captured web storage (localStorage + sessionStorage) in exports (v0.10.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/homebrew-tap.summary: bumped casks for cc-vigil v0.1.0, cc-notes v0.21.1, cc-pool v0.48.0, and ccx v0.7.0

PushEvent:yasyf/yclaw.summary: hardened the hermes home server — per-boot agent-vault proxy refresh, in-guest rebuild swap, tailnet cleanup

captain-hook@v8.13.0.summary: added ReadOnlyCommand and read-only/LLM-judge permission hooks, hardened against shell-expansion false-approves

cc-context@v0.7.0.summary: the ccx web op family — fetch/cite/chunk with BM25+RRF fusion, local embeddings, and page-dump guards

cc-interact@v0.1.0.summary: first release — the domain-agnostic agent/daemon/web framework extracted from cc-review

cc-notes@v0.21.1.summary: viz web UI polish — SSE reconnect refetch, lazy detail chunks, and a sticky lane-label gutter

cc-pool@v0.48.0.summary: added account add via claude auth login and pinned the self-heal policy constants

cc-vigil@v0.1.0.summary: first release — a notarized menu-bar app whose oracle ages out stale Claude sessions with a self-healing dead-man clear

spawnllm@v0.5.5.summary: passed codex --skip-git-repo-check so verdicts run in untrusted cwds
